audit_items.proof_trace: `SetImageType()` returns `MagickBooleanType` (integer enum: MagickFalse=0, MagickTrue=1), not a pointer — the NULL-check/dereference assertion is inapplicable to this return type. Internal allocations (`AcquireImageInfo`, `AcquireQuantizeInfo`) call `ThrowFatalException` on OOM and never return NULL. All 30+ callers either discard the return with `(void)` or compare against `MagickFalse`; none treat the return value as a pointer to dereference.
